name: coxd-pr-lifecycle
description: Run the full merge -> deploy -> verify -> close -> cleanup lifecycle for a ready PR, especially one shipped by an autonomous coding-agent worker whose PR body never auto-links the issue. Diffs the merge commit to pick the right deploy target, always verifies via the real traffic path (not a container-internal check that can lie), closes the issue when it didn't auto-link, and cleans up worktrees/branches/task-store state. Ships the coxd-pr-lifecycle skill + a /coxd-ship command.
